---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and when?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. Be concrete if you can.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Scope / impact

- Component(s) touched: backend / frontend / pipeline / docs
- Does it change a Pydantic model? If so, the frontend data shape must change in the same PR.
- Does it change pipeline phases, Linkup endpoints, or budget guards? If so, `docs/Learning/ARCHITECTURE.md` must be updated.

## Additional context

Anything else — mockups, links, prior art.
